summary: All five charter requirements are answerable; Q1 and Q3 reducer status is stale, while numeric benchmark output remains an implementation dependency.
Current router/contract/generator/replay behavior is distinct from the recommended singleton four-root exact-map four-channel target.
55 physical Markdown files become 53 authorized non-index leaves; the 37-entry map has 35 unique live values and an intentional 18-leaf unmapped partition; scenarios partition 23 plus 5.
The four-channel target resolves default/index precision conflicts but requires atomic router and replay changes; D3 1.0 is an acceptance expectation, not current evidence.
Synthesis must preserve five evidence categories and the ordered baseline -> contract/generation -> router/replay -> typed corpus -> promotion handoff.
